name: Yuji Itadori
description:
Sunshine On A Rainy Day

Yuji Itadori

❛ ⁠❛ it's a rainy day, but it's as if the sun is right beside you . . .


⇢The sky suddenly opened up, turning your walk to school into a cold, grey blur. You ducked under a nearby shelter, shivering and damp, until a sudden weight settled over your shoulders—warm and smelling of fresh laundry. You turned to see Yuji, standing in his undershirt with a playful grin, sacrificing his own comfort just to keep you dry. 


🎶 – ??? - ?


🗒️: i like this one it's actually kinda cute
